resolvedQuestions.question: How should current skills migrate?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Alias sk-design-interface into interface-craft and keep sk-design-md-generator as the system-reference extraction child or compatibility alias.

resolvedQuestions.question: Single hub with nested packets or umbrella router over siblings?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Use an umbrella router over sibling skills with shared core references.

resolvedQuestions.question: What child taxonomy should sk-design use?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Use six children: strategy, interface-craft, interaction-motion, system-reference, critique-quality, and delivery-ops.

keyFindings.finding: Audit, critique, polish, and harden are evaluation/refinement workflows and should not be hidden inside creation guidance.
designer-skills-main uses category/plugin boundaries as the stable structural unit.
Existing internal skills already split visual invention from measured design-system extraction.
The corpus explicitly favors routing to the smallest useful context rather than loading a broad design blob.

keyFindings.label: Corpus has two orthogonal axes: domain (interface/layout/color/motion) x mode (build/audit/refine)
audit.md proves impeccable is a shared-context HUB with in-hub routing
Three structural exemplars in corpus: hub (impeccable), umbrella (designer-skills), router (ui-skills-root)
impeccable is a complete hub-with-nested-mode-packets skill (parent template)
The sk-design-* family already exists as cross-referencing siblings with no parent
Coupling asymmetry: interface (judgment) vs md-generator (Playwright backend) share only DESIGN.md
Coupling signal matrix: 5 umbrella, 1 hub, 2 neutral
Recommendation: umbrella-router parent + shared base, hub inside interface child
Keep flat sk-design-* names (umbrella makes this free) = zero reference rewrites

keyFindings.statement: The external designer-skills-main corpus organizes into 9 plugins / 97 skills across design-research, design-systems, ux-strategy, ui-design, interaction-design, prototyping-testing, design-ops, designer-toolkit, and visual-critique.
The optimal sk-design taxonomy is 6 children: direction, foundations, motion, critique, system, presentation.
sk-design-interface maps to sk-design-direction; sk-design-md-generator maps to sk-design-system.
The parent should use a hub-with-nested-packets model, mirroring deep-loop-workflows, to preserve a single advisor identity and the existing sk-design-* family metadata.
Legacy triggers from sk-design-interface and sk-design-md-generator must be preserved as registry aliases to maintain backward compatibility.
